location.office_time_required: some time remote, some time in office, and some time traveling in the field

level_signals: Leads a team of 20+ merchant-facing reps
Reports to Senior Director of Merchant Strategy and GTM
Comp range $197,200–$290,000 base, consistent with Director-level at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Track record of impact – you've been in the trenches and have a proven track record of driving significant, company-wide impact.
Bias to action and agility – you move quickly and thrive in a fast-paced environment. No job is beneath you and you lead from the front.
"Breakthrough walls" mentality – you are constantly pushing the envelope of what is possible and can figure out a way to make almost anything happen. You're a playmaker.
Clarity of thought – you can articulate a clear vision to cross-functional partners.
Skilled executive management and communication, especially at managing up and across DoorDash and going toe to toe with our most senior leaders.
Strong leadership and maturity to build (attract, hire, retain) and scale a world-class organization.
Proven ability to create clarity and focus in complex and ambiguous problem spaces; prioritization and pragmatism.
Demonstrated experience in building the team necessary to fulfill the strategy. Proactively involved in recruiting, mentoring, and developing team members.

scope.surface: Sales Lab — incubating DoorDash's highest-priority growth bets across all verticals and merchant segments, from proof-of-concept through full-scale launch
scope.business_model: marketplace / platform (B2B merchant-facing), targeting next $1B business opportunity
primary_metrics_inferred: Revenue growth and profitability of new bets
cross_functional_partners: Senior Director of Merchant Strategy and GTM
core_responsibilities: Lead a team of 20+ merchant-facing reps testing pitches, pricing models, and features
Document learnings to provide data-backed recommendations on strategy, product, and pricing
Create playbooks for scaled launches and go-to-market readiness
Set vision for team operations and own performance, coaching, and sales skill development
Partner with General Managers to define product-market-fit across verticals and customer profiles
Guide discovery, testing, and scaling process for new bets into full-fledged products
Drive sales strategy for new and existing products including GTM motions (bundling, packages, sequencing)

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($197,200–$290,000 base) with equity upside
Clear team size and reporting structure stated
High-visibility role at the forefront of DoorDash's innovation portfolio
Flexible hybrid work policy including some remote time
Role has explicit expected fill date (7/3/2026), suggesting active and time-bound search
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
red_flags: Field travel required to visit merchants — extent of travel not quantified
No cities listed for in-office requirements, making location expectations unclear
Nice-to-haves section entirely absent — makes it harder to assess flexibility in candidate profile
Wide comp band ($93K spread) may indicate significant leveling ambiguity or location-based variance

ambiguities: No cities are named for this role specifically; national pay range is provided. Location type is described as flexible hybrid with field travel but no office locations are tied to this role.
The wide base salary range ($197,200–$290,000) likely reflects both geographic pay localization and potential leveling variance; unclear which factor drives the spread more.

All requirements appear in 'We're Excited About You Because You Have' section — none are explicitly labeled 'required' vs 'preferred', so all were classified as hard must-haves based on unconditional language.
